zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Drew於大約1390年出生在英國維爾爾時，他的父親Lawrence Drew37歲，母親Lucy Restwold32歲。他於大約1420年與Agnes在英國結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1454年2月20日在英國波克夏享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Drew于大约1390年出生在英国維爾爾时，他的父亲Lawrence Drew37岁，母亲Lucy Restwold32岁。他于大约1420年与Agnes在英国结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1454年2月20日在英国波克夏享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from a Norman French personal name Dreus based on ancient Germanic Drogo, the name of one of the sons of Charlemagne (compare Gothic driugan ‘to serve as a soldier’). In Old French this name became Dreus, Drues (nominative) and Dru, Driu, Dreu (accusative) and was introduced to England by the Normans. For further information about this name, see also Montague .
English: from the personal name Drew, a pet form of Andrew which was confused with the same name of Old French origin (see 1 above).

Irish: when not an adoption of the English surname, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Druaidh or Ó Druaidh or Ó Draoi ‘son’ and ‘descendant of the druid’, from draoi ‘druid’, genitive druadh or draoi. All of these were often Anglicized as Drury .

variants.name: Drews
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhard, Gunter, Hans, Heinz, Helmut, Otto, Reinhold, Bernd, Detlef, Egon, Erna.
English: variant of Drew with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also found in Guernsey in the Channel Islands.
Americanized form of German, Danish, and Dutch   Drewes  .

variants.name: Drewer
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Droart, Drouart (which is probably from ancient Germanic Droghard, with the first element as in Drew + hard ‘brave, hardy’).

variants.name: Drewett
meanings: English (Wiltshire, Berkshire, and Surrey): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Druet, a diminutive of Drue, Dreu (from ancient Germanic Drogo); see Drew 1. Alternatively, the name may be from a diminutive of Old French dru ‘lover’; see Drew 4.

variants.name: Dronet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Desire, Olympe.

French (mainly Loire-Atlantique): from a diminutive of the personal name Dron, derived from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ).

variants.name: Droz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Aida, Cruz Maria, Diego, Jose, Miguel, Milagros, Nydia, Osvaldo, Rodriguez, Vidal.

French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). This surname is also found in Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Drea
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny): shortened Anglicized form of Ó Draoi (see Drew ).

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: Drouin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Benoit, Jacques, Andre, Clermont, Emile, Gaston, Gilles, Ovide, Pierre, Serge.

French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Droue, a variant of Dreue, which is from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). Compare Derouen , Derouin , and Tron .

variants.name: Drury
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Drury  .

variants.name: Drouhard
meanings: French:
from the ancient Germanic personal name Droghard, composed of the elements drog (presumably meaning ‘battle’; see also Drew ) and hard ‘hard, strong’.
alternatively, a derivative of the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names like Droghard (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Drew was born about 1390, in Wiltshire, England, his father, Lawrence Drew, was 37 and his mother, Lucy Restwold, was 32. He married Agnes about 1420, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 20 February 1454, in Berkshire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Drew est né environ 1390, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Lawrence Drew, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lucy Restwold, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes environ 1420, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 20 février 1454, à Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Drew um 1390 in Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lawrence Drew 37 und seine Mutter Lucy Restwold 32. Er hat um 1420 in England Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Februar 1454 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Drew è nato il circa 1390 nel Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Lawrence Drew, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Restwold, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Agnes circa 1420, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1454, nel Berkshire, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイア
ja.Berkshire, England: イギリスバークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Drewが約1390年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lawrence Drewは37歳，母Lucy Restwoldは32歳であった。約1420年にイギリスでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1454年2月20日にイギリスバークシュアイアで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Drew(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lawrence Drew(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Restwold(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1420년 영국에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1454년 2월 20일 영국 버크실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Drew nasceu aproximadamente 1390, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lawrence Drew, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Restwold, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes aproximadamente 1420, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1454, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Drew родился около 1390 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lawrence Drew было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Restwold, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes около 1420 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 20 февраля 1454 г. в местности биркшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Drew nació aproximadamente 1390, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lawrence Drew, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lucy Restwold, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Agnes aproximadamente 1420, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1454, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
